controls.rationale: Replacing or destroying a key changes the access boundary on every ciphertext that depended on it.
controls.title: Logical and Physical Access Controls

controls.rationale: Key destruction is irreversible for any data encrypted under it.
controls.title: Restriction of Information Asset Movements

controls.rationale: Loss of a key without backed-up plaintext breaks recovery for encrypted data.
controls.title: Availability — Recovery

changes.explanation: Terraform will replace a KMS key. Key identity changes can break decrypt access for data and services that depend on the old key.

controls.rationale: Trust policy or attached-policy changes can broaden who can assume the role.
controls.title: Logical and Physical Access Controls

changes.explanation: Terraform will update IAM authorization. Review trust policies, permission boundaries, and deny statements for lockout or escalation risk.

controls.rationale: Security groups are a primary network-boundary control on AWS.
controls.title: Boundary Protection

changes.explanation: Terraform will create a new resource without changing existing state.
Terraform will update this resource in place. Review the changed attributes and rollout timing before applying.
